Name: insert_departments_one
SQL: WITH insert_data AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "id", $2::text AS "name", $3::numeric AS "budget") AS data), _mutation_result AS (INSERT INTO "public"."departments" ("id", "name", "budget") SELECT insert_data."id", insert_data."name", insert_data."budget" FROM insert_data RETURNING *), post_check AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _mutation_result WHERE _mutation_result."has_high_budget" = $4::bool) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _mutation_result) THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT 0 FROM (SELECT constellation_throw_error('check constraint of an insert/update permission has failed', 'ZZ901')) x) END AS status), mutation_result AS (SELECT * FROM _mutation_result WHERE (SELECT status FROM post_check) = 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."name" AS "name", mutation_result."budget" AS "budget", mutation_result."has_high_budget" AS "has_high_budget") AS "_e")) FROM mutation_result
